name: Mosaic ImmunoEngineering Inc.
business: Mosaic ImmunoEngineering Inc. is a development-stage biotechnology company focused on advancing and commercializing immunotherapies for the treatment of cancer. The company currently has no approved products and its previous license for the cowpea mosaic virus platform was terminated in March 2024. It is pursuing a binding term sheet with Oncotelic Therapeutics to acquire rights to necroptosis cancer therapies and access to AI technologies for immunotherapy combinations.

exposures.sentence: We are a development-stage biotechnology company focused on advancing and eventually commercializing immunotherapies for the treatment of cancer.
non-exclusive access to its proprietary Artificial Intelligence ( AI ) technologies for identifying immunotherapy combinations
